commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the displayable chat final history refresh in the TUI event handler and updates focused event-handler tests.

Reproducibility: unclear. for a full live repro: source inspection shows current main can reload history before finalizing displayable output and loadHistory clears the chat log, but this review did not establish a real failing TUI run.
commands.review_followup: Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because the branch has a narrow code defect and still needs direct real TUI behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(tui): avoid stale history refresh after final response
target.author: nao860226-rgb
